name: Bear Elite Hybrid
tagline: Premium recovery-focused hybrid for athletes and active sleepers
description: The Bear Elite Hybrid is the brand's flagship mattress, upgrading the popular Bear Original with a hybrid coil system, enhanced cooling, and multiple firmness options. It features the same Celliant infrared recovery technology but with a more luxurious feel. Ideal for athletes and active individuals who want the recovery benefits with better support and cooling.

specs.material: Memory foam + pocketed coils + Celliant cover

seoTitle: Bear Elite Hybrid 2026: Premium Recovery Mattress for Athletes?
seoDescription: Bear Elite Hybrid upgrades the popular Bear mattress with coils and multiple firmness options. Celliant technology for recovery. Learn more!
